name: hackathon-engine
description: TCS GenAI Lab Hackathon Orchestration Engine

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.build:exe: npm run build:client && pkg launcher.cjs --targets node18-win-x64 --output dist-exe/HackathonEngine.exe --assets "server/**/*,client/dist/**/*"
